description_long: This object is a shotgun with a modern, tactical appearance, featuring a predominantly black and gray digital camouflage pattern across its entire body. The shotgun has a long, cylindrical barrel and a full stock, both covered in the same camo finish, with a slightly textured surface that suggests a matte or grippy coating. The receiver and trigger area are compact, with a visible trigger guard that is rounded and moderately sized. The fore-end appears to be integrated with the barrel, and there is no visible pump or lever mechanism, indicating a likely semi-automatic or break-action design. The overall build is streamlined, with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel, and the stock is solid and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The shotgun's design is utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios, and its materials suggest a combination of metal and polymer for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern shotgun with a black and gray digital camouflage finish, full stock, and streamlined, utilitarian design. The object features a long barrel, rounded trigger guard, and no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the full stock, long barrel, and the digital camo pattern; the trigger guard and receiver are partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the barrel and stock, with the camo pattern clearly visible along the entire body.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view emphasizing the ergonomic shape of the stock and the alignment of the barrel; the trigger area is less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the shotgun, with the camo pattern and solid stock clearly displayed.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_action_mechanism: semi-automatic or break-action (no visible pump or lever)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
